visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a white off-the-shoulder top and a dark apron, stands in a kitchen holding a large bag of frozen shrimp from Costco. (2) She holds a single large frozen shrimp in the palm of her hand to demonstrate its significant size relative to her hand. (3) Raw shrimp are shown in a stainless steel bowl, seasoned with salt and black pepper; they appear grey and translucent. (4) A hand is seen pouring cooking oil into a stainless steel pan on a gas stove. (5) The shrimp are placed into the hot pan using metal tongs, immediately creating a large cloud of white steam. (6) A mesh splatter guard is held over the pan as the shrimp fry. (7) The woman grinds more black pepper directly over the shrimp as they begin to turn pink. (8) The woman holds up a bottle of Bacardi white rum and pours a generous amount into the pan, resulting in a dramatic burst of steam. (9) A close-up shot shows a cooked shrimp being held by tongs; the meat is opaque white and the shell is bright orange. (10) The woman presents the finished plate of cooked shrimp, looking satisfied. (11) Two women sit at a low table in a living room, peeling and eating the shrimp. One wears a grey bucket hat. They use hand gestures and facial expressions of delight.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 好廚師阿頭上菜. [Variety]: 真香系列. [Subtitle]: 料理冷凍去頭白蝦. [Subtitle]: 現在教大家. (2) [Subtitle]: 每一個都快跟手掌一樣大. (3) [Subtitle]: 非常巨大喔. [Subtitle]: 不用退冰. [Subtitle]: 直接過水洗. [Subtitle]: 加胡椒跟鹽巴. (4) [Subtitle]: 熱鍋倒油. [Subtitle]: 這是什麼油. [Subtitle]: 一般耐高溫的油. (5) [Subtitle]: 中火乾煎. [Subtitle]: 可以加一點花椒或乾辣椒. [Subtitle]: 紅了就翻面. (6) [Subtitle]: 然後可以加一些白酒去嗆他. [Subtitle]: 或是廚師想喝. [Variety]: 也可以來一口. [Subtitle]: 嗆他. [Subtitle]: 直接對嘴吹. [Subtitle]: 嗆! 你這個笨蛋. [Subtitle]: 哇好香喔. (7) [Subtitle]: 殼都紅透之後. [Subtitle]: 然後中間它肉比較厚. [Subtitle]: 沒有透明的肉就代表熟了. (8) [Slogan]: 好廚師阿頭上菜. [Subtitle]: 上菜囉. (9) [Subtitle]: 哇 這個皮超好剝. [Subtitle]: 直接打開. [Subtitle]: 宵夜下酒菜都很方便. [Subtitle]: 好燙. [Variety]: 很多汁很香. [Subtitle]: 很嫩. [Subtitle]: 而且肉超大塊. [Subtitle]: 好好吃喔. [Subtitle]: 我又愛上你了. [Subtitle]: 它的殼非常好剝. [Subtitle]: 但是好燙.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in the kitchen, joined by 1 female friend in the living room for the tasting segment.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young woman with long black hair, wearing a white off-the-shoulder shirt and a brown/dark apron.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Modern kitchen with stainless steel appliances, a gas stove, and a countertop. Later, a living room with a low table, couch, and pet accessories visible in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, guitar-driven pop BGM begins with high energy. The primary female voice introduces the Costco shrimp topic with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone. (2) A metallic clinking sound of tongs occurs as raw shrimp are handled. (3) Continuous narration explains the preparation steps with a fast speech rate and bright inflection. (4) A loud, sustained 'pssssh' sizzling sound is heard as shrimp hit the hot oiled pan, signifying high-temperature cooking. (5) A sharp mechanical clicking sound occurs from the pepper grinder being turned. (6) A liquid pouring sound is immediately followed by an explosive 'whoosh' steam sound as white wine is added to the pan. (7) The BGM continues as the voices shift to the tasting scene. (8) Two female voices engage in excited dialogue, using 'Mmm' and 'Wow' vocalizations. (9) Soft percussive sounds of shells being peeled and rhythmic chewing noises are audible.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and provide a simple cooking tutorial for Costco's frozen headless white shrimp, highlighting their size, ease of preparation, and taste quality.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video starts with a large Costco logo and features a specific Costco product (frozen shrimp) throughout the tutorial and review.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy social media format with colorful text overlays and fast-paced editing to engage viewers in a lifestyle cooking context.
